response.overview: On his arduous journey through the desert and the years it took to produce the award-winning Sirāt, Oliver Laxe was accompanied by the faithful and attentive Uberto Rapisardi, who captured the preparation and shoot, as well as moments of solitary reflection, profound communion, discouragement and elation, creating a unique behind-the-scenes account that takes on a life of its own.
response.title: Vacío Luminoso
